description_long: This object consists of two stacked hardcover books, both with light-colored covers that show signs of wear and age. The top book features a minimalist line drawing of a mechanical object, possibly a typewriter or similar device, rendered in black ink on a plain white background. The bottom book is slightly larger and has a faded, off-white cover with gold embossed text along the spine. The edges of the pages are visible and appear slightly yellowed, indicating age or frequent use. Both books have a sturdy, rectangular form and are closed, with no visible bookmarks or accessories. The overall appearance suggests these are vintage or classic books, suitable for display or reading in an urban environment.
description: Two stacked hardcover books, one with a white cover and line drawing, the other with a faded cover and gold spine text. Both show signs of age and use.
description_view_0: Top-down view showing the white cover with a black line drawing and the gold-embossed spine of the bottom book.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the thickness of both books and the slightly yellowed page edges.
description_view_2: Bottom-up view focusing on the plain, slightly worn covers and the layered appearance of the two books.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the closed page edges and the sturdy, rectangular form of the stacked books.
attribute_cover_illustration: The main illustration on the top book's cover is a minimalist black line drawing depicting a mechanical object, possibly a typewriter or drafting tool, rendered in a technical, schematic style. The rest of the cover is plain and unadorned.
attribute_spine_design: The spine of the bottom book is off-white with gold embossed text in a cursive style, oriented horizontally. The top book's spine is white with black text and a small line drawing, also oriented horizontally.
